LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT SHOWN THAT HE NEEDS ALL OF HIS INCOME FOR SUPPORT. THE $229.29 IN FUNDS HELD BY THE SAN MATEO COUNTY SHERRIFF SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE COURT ORDERS THAT $75.00 FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS BE WITHHELD PER PAY PERIOD TO SATISFY THE DEBT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - Judgment Debtor's claim of exemption is denied. Judgment Debtor has not shown that he needs all of his income for support. The $229.29 in funds held by the San Mateo County Sherriff shall be released to the judgment Creditor. The Court orders that $75.00 from Debtor's earnings be withheld per pay period to satisfy the debt. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
